title: taraxacum nitrophilum
intro: Taraxacum nitrophilum, also known as the upland dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Taraxacum nitrophilum include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
